title: Citrusy German Sausage Melanzane
description: A low-calorie-friendly citrusy Malaysian dish featuring German sausages, melanzane (aubergine), and a touch of lemon zest for a chewy, crowd-pleaser.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes (if using), sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Add quartered aubergines to the pan, sprinkle with oregano leaves and lemon juice. Cook covered for approximately 10-15 minutes or until tender.
In a small bowl, mix cooked German sausages into the aubergine mixture, ensuring they're well coated in the liquid.
Serve hot as an appetizer or side dish.
